product.title: Ideal for Light/Medium Complexions-Hush Makeup Foundation, Mushroom Head Air Cushion CC Cream - BB Cream Foundation for Older Women (Natural color)
featureBullets: 【Gentle & Nourishing for Mature/Sensitive Skin】 Enriched with Hyaluronic Acid and Dimethicone, this cushion foundation caters to sensitive, dry, or mature skin types, effectively preventing caking and creasing while delivering long-lasting comfort.

【Warm Golden Shade for Light-Medium Complexions】A perfect warm-neutral tone that complements light to medium skin with golden or olive undertones, evening out uneven skin tone for a refreshed, natural-looking finish.

【All-Day Hydrating Skincare Formula】Infused with moisture-locking Hyaluronic Acid, it keeps skin supple and hydrated throughout the day, maintaining a healthy, radiant complexion without drying out the skin.

【Lightweight Buildable Coverage (No Heavy Feeling)】The lightweight cushion formula blends seamlessly for buildable coverage, blurring fine lines and texture imperfections without feeling greasy or settling into fine lines.

【Effortless Application with Mushroom Puff】Comes with a soft mushroom-shaped puff for quick, streak-free application—ideal for daily makeup routines and on-the-go touch-ups, creating a flawless base in seconds.
product.description: The Benefits - No need to pick a perfect shade -Great for dry or mature skin -Stays smooth all day -No mess, no stress -Gentle on sensitive skin How to use Step1-Prep Your skin: Start with clean, moisturized skin. You don't need aprimer-just your usual skincare is enough. Step2-Press the Sponge: Gently press the mushroom applicator into the cushion. Alittle goes a long way, so no need to press hard or overdoit Step 3-Tap: Don't RubUse light tapping motions to apply the product to yourface. Start in the center and blend outward. The formulamelts into your skin and adjusts to your tone in seconds. Step 4 - Build: lf You Need MoreOne layer gives a soft, natural skin. For more coveragejust tap again where needed-without it ever lookingheavy or cakey. Specifications: Name: Hush Makeup Foundation Net Weight: 0.63 oz Finish: Natural and Clear Shelf Life: 3 Years Color: Warm Key Ingredients: Water/ Dimethicone/ Polyglyceryl-3 Distearate/ Hyaluronic Acid Note: 1.Due to manual measurement, please allow a difference of 1-5g/1-2cm. 2.Due to different displays and different lighting, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item. Thank you for your understanding.

specification.value: Color Correction, Corrects Imperfections, Firming, Hydrating
